run_type: B — Indeed UAE + web search (Bayt, LinkedIn, GulfTalent, Glassdoor, company careers)

intellectual property lawyer IP legal counsel (Dubai, Indeed)

ready_to_apply.salary_estimate: AED 10,000–14,000/month estimated (not listed; Glassdoor 2026 Dubai paralegal benchmark: AED 8,500–18,417/month; KAYALI is a luxury brand / Huda Beauty subsidiary — above-market compensation expected)
ready_to_apply.salary_filter: PASS — estimated well above AED 8,000 threshold
ready_to_apply.match_score: Strong (3/3 keywords: IP law + trademark filings, legal drafting, legal research)
ready_to_apply.why_strong: Role description maps almost 1:1 to SS Rana & Co. experience: trademark filings, renewals, monitoring, brand protection, coordinating with trademark offices, IP compliance advisories, audit-ready documentation, budget tracking. WIPO Madrid System course is a direct bonus.
ready_to_apply.experience_note: Requires ~5 years (Tanya has 2+). Gap is real but skills alignment is exceptionally strong — worth applying.

Conducted I.P legal research and prepared compliance advisories for brand protection
Coordinated filings with clients, counsel, and trademark offices
Maintained structured documentation to support audits and reviews
Tracked litigation budgets and monitored case timelines

ready_to_apply.posted: Active listing on GulfTalent as of April 2026

ready_to_apply.salary_filter: PASS — estimated well above AED 8,000 threshold

ready_to_apply.why_strong: Al Tamimi is the largest MENA law firm. DIFC is a common law jurisdiction — highly favourable for Indian-qualified lawyers. Role involves legal research, legal opinions, drafting, case management — all direct CV matches. Financial Crime exposure (white/blue-collar criminal work) is present in Tanya's independent practice.
ready_to_apply.experience_note: Requires 3+ years minimum (Tanya has 2+). Slight gap. Practice area is Financial Crime (not IP), but legal research + drafting skills are fully transferable.

cv_bullets: Conducted legal research, prepared legal opinions, and analysed statutes, case law, and regulations relevant to compliance, I.P, criminal and commercial disputes

Completed over two years of post-qualification legal practice through work with multiple attorneys' chambers, with broad exposure to intellectual property, regulatory compliance, commercial and criminal litigation disputes

ready_to_apply.why_possible: Strong skills match across all 3 keywords. Visa sponsorship + medical + 30 days leave explicitly mentioned. Role covers commercial, civil, and IP matters — Tanya's exact background.
ready_to_apply.experience_note: Prefers 2 years UAE/GCC experience (Tanya has Indian experience — competitive gap). Not a hard exclusion. Applications from India-qualified Dubai-based lawyers are common for this role type.

KAYALI: Global Corporate Counsel — Senior counsel role, requires substantial in-house corporate experience
